## Summary

What does this pull request change, and why?

## Related issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes, and new behaviour is covered by tests.
- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` is clean.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has an entry for any user-visible change.
- [ ] Documentation under `docs/` is updated if behaviour or configuration changed.
- [ ] The description explains the *why*, not just the *what*.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything specific you want feedback on, or context that helps the review.
